message.content:
@startuml
participant "«boundary»\nZMRegistracijskiObrazec" as ZMR
participant "«boundary»\nZMDomačaStran" as ZMD
participant "«control»\nKrmilnikRegistracija" as KR
participant "«entity»\nUporabnik" as U

[-> ZMR
activate ZMR

ZMR -> KR
activate KR

KR -> U
activate U

U --> KR
deactivate U

KR --> ZMR
deactivate KR

ZMR -> ZMD
activate ZMD
deactivate ZMD

deactivate ZMR
@enduml
